# James Bond third-party components

These browser builds are vendored for offline runtime use by `src/web-games/james-bond/`.

| File | Package | Version | License | SHA-256 |
|---|---|---:|---|---|
| `rapier-0.19.3.mjs` | `@dimforge/rapier3d-compat` | 0.19.3 | Apache-2.0 | `bce2c762b440101ebf8cbff038a71fe1884488becd0a53b9a7c0a7e3daf13a2b` |
| `yuka-0.7.8.module.js` | `yuka` | 0.7.8 | MIT | `9b0c24534a47f2e1c9549a63a5e00a850577e22fe8d18dbc7a532008a027cb89` |
| `howler-2.2.4.min.js` | `howler` | 2.2.4 | MIT | `736c339444c88baad593e24afdf1d6e8f574019b4e37a110ecb453ff745ffd41` |

Sources:

- https://www.npmjs.com/package/@dimforge/rapier3d-compat/v/0.19.3
- https://www.npmjs.com/package/yuka/v/0.7.8
- https://www.npmjs.com/package/howler/v/2.2.4

The Rapier package metadata declares Apache-2.0. The canonical license text is at
https://github.com/dimforge/rapier.js/blob/master/LICENSE. Yuka and Howler license
texts are stored alongside this manifest as `LICENSE-YUKA` and `LICENSE-HOWLER`.
